site.title: Sabro
site.tagline: Original English translations of the Peshitta and the Syriac Fathers

home.eyebrow: The Peshitta and the Syriac Fathers
home.lede: Original English translations of the Peshitta and of the commentaries of the Syriac Church Fathers — with the underlying Syriac and biblical cross-references throughout.
home.aboutBody: Sabro publishes original English translations of two interlocking corpora: the Peshitta (the Syriac Bible) and the commentaries of the Syriac Church Fathers. The MVP begins with the commentaries of Dionysios bar Ṣalibi (d. 1171), Metropolitan of Amid; the long-term scope is the broader patristic tradition.
home.statusBody: A small slice of the corpus is online; chapters are added as they are translated and peer-reviewed. The lexicon and translations APIs are public and consumed by other apps in the ecosystem.
